summary: RIDEMIND backend + frontend e2e tested. 14/14 pytest tests passing (auth, courses, checkout, video-analysis with Claude AI, spot-recommend with Open-Meteo, plan gating). Frontend pages (Landing, Pricing, Courses, Dashboard, VideoAnalysis, SpotRecommender) load correctly with cookie-based auth.
critical_code_review_comments: CORSMiddleware uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers reject this combo for credentialed requests. Consider setting CORS_ORIGINS to the actual frontend origin in production.
video-analysis stores uploaded files on local disk (ROOT_DIR/uploads) - won't survive pod restarts; consider object storage.
test_credentials: Bearer token: test_session_1781006912634 (premium user rider.test@ridemind.com inserted via mongosh)
seed_data_creation: Inserted premium test user + session, plus a standard user and a free user (for 402/403 tests) into test_database.users and user_sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py reads TEST_SESSION_TOKEN env var; defaults to seeded premium token. All 14 tests pass in ~58s including real Stripe checkout creation (returns checkout.stripe.com URL) and real Claude Sonnet 4.5 video-analysis (returns French diagnostic). Frontend verified at https://wave-coach-3.preview.emergentagent.com with cookie session_token injection for auth-gated routes.
